title: Avoid predictable string operations
description: Performing operations on a string with predictable outcomes should be avoided. This rule helps to prevent unnecessary and redundant operations in your code. Examples include checking if a string contains itself, comparing a string with itself, and replacing a string with itself.
recommendation: Replace predictable string operations with more efficient alternatives.
impact: Reduces unnecessary operations and improves code quality.

checks.message: Replace predictable string operations with more efficient alternatives.
